note: Each array item is one original git diff line; a blank context line is preserved as a single-space string.
lines: - Draft notes can be edited by an Agent only in a candidate worktree.
- Final acceptance happens after diff review.
+Sync, backup, and Git solve different problems. Sync keeps devices current, backup preserves recoverable copies, and Git records intentional history for review.
Git records snapshots and diffs for a vault. It does not decide whether a note is private, and it does not replace an independent backup.
+An Agent candidate should be reviewed by diff before merge. The diff shows exactly which notes changed so a human can accept or reject the candidate intentionally.
+summary: synthetic candidate prepared for human diff review.
